title: salix × inticensis
intro: Salix × incomposita, also known as hybrid willow or crack willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salix genus. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix × incomposita include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as treating conditions such as arthritis and gout. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation.
